# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-04-30 | **更新时间**: 07:15 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[21:15]` **🏛️监管 | Expression Therapeutics 获得 FDA 对 A 型血友病干细胞疗法的快速通道和罕见儿科疾病指定**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Expression Therapeutics Receives FDA Fast Track and Rare Pediatric Disease Designations for Investigational Stem Cell Therapy for Hemophilia A* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **ME Therapeutics 提供体内 CAR 和治疗 mRNA 项目的科学更新**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *ME Therapeutics Provides Scientific Update on In Vivo CAR and Therapeutic mRNA Programs* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:56]` **🏛️监管 | NanoMosaic 将在 ASGCT 2026 上展示 FDA/CBER AMT 指定分析平台**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *NanoMosaic to Showcase the FDA/CBER AMT Designated Analytics Platform at ASGCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:01]` **Precision BioSciences 启动首个临床试验中心并开始 1/2 期 FUNCTION-DMD 研究患者入组**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Precision BioSciences Activates First Clinical Trial Site and Begins Patient Enrollment in Phase 1/2 FUNCTION-DMD Study* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[08:00]` **🏛️监管 | FDA Direct：实时临床试验的力量**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *FDA Direct: The Power of Real-Time Clinical Trials* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxPX1Y5S0NmbmsxVjlVUWhibWNIMUNQallxdXNoSkNSX3JUM3NZaXpVYkFPZE1fcnpIbF9DbFNjQXFXZU8wWGE1NXhicWxnZGxpSUJyXzFUT2ZXbEpRMnYteEc1U2hUUG9kcWkwUU9RbDlNU1BWVHptX09tYkpjdmlrNnFNbm5pTHJ0VVhqaXZ0VGFvd3NrQXhr?oc=5)</small>

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[06:02]` **Curocell 获得韩国首个本土 CAR-T 疗法的批准**

  <br><small>🇬🇧 *China’s NMPA Grants Priority Review and Breakthrough Therapy Designation to HUTCHMED’s Sovleplenib for wAIHA Treatment* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[16:43]` **🔥In-vivo | 微滔生物完成超5000万美元A轮与A+轮融资，加速in vivo CAR-T创新研发** [🔗阅读原文](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTE9aaFhlYkVfd3VZbFd5dXFiYmdNNFZIdjU2THQ4YzdQcDVHQjB5ZXhpcnBncmxhOXBlX292SkdPeTQxQ3RjMTc5MEFFb0o5UmxBbHE1c25vR3RUZE9QeUNSOXF0SWROdFc1cXFFQ2kxN0UtYjVjaWVub2s0SWxBdw?oc=5)
